title: Ports, Protocols, Services, and Traffic Types · Protocol Clinic: Net Dns Dhcp Time Dependencies
summary: Build and diagnose a service-access matrix from client, firewall, resolver, server, and capture evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net dns dhcp time dependencies increment in a verified protocol and service matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain how DNS, DHCP, NTP, PTP, and NTS dependencies affect authentication, addressing, logging, and service reachability.
Compare secure and insecure service alternatives such as SSH or Telnet, HTTPS or HTTP, LDAPS or LDAP, and SFTP or FTP.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
